mainEntity.name: What if a Phoenix firm gets negative reviews impacting AI visibility?
mainEntity.text: What if a Phoenix firm gets negative reviews impacting AI visibility?

acceptedAnswer.text: Respond professionally within 48 hours, request Google updates, and amplify 10x positive reviews. AI weighs volume/patterns over isolated negatives after 30-60 days.

suggestedAnswer.text: Phoenix attorneys counter via detailed, empathetic replies showing resolution. Boost positives via client campaigns targeting Arizona cases. AI prioritizes 4.5+ stars with 50+ reviews. Legal risks: Fake review solicitation violates FTC rules. Monitor Yelp/Google for patterns insurers reference.

name: Handling Bad Reviews for Phoenix AI Visibility
description: Respond professionally within 48 hours, request Google updates, and amplify 10x positive reviews. AI weighs volume/patterns over isolated negatives after 30-60
